note_text:
Patient: 40F presenting with deficit radiculopathy.
Conservative management including beta-blockers, corticosteroid injection was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring general physician requests authorization for extended physical therapy.

Patient: 63M presenting with functional radiculopathy.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring general physician requests authorization for extended physical therapy.

Patient: 55F presenting with radiculopathy.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with radiculopathy.
Referring general physician requests authorization for extended physical therapy.

Patient: 70M presenting with instability osteoarthritis.
Conservative management including preventive medication trial, dietary and lifestyle modification was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring general physician requests authorization for knee brace.

Patient: 80M presenting with instability osteoarthritis.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with osteoarthritis.
Referring general physician requests authorization for knee brace.

Patient: 37M presenting with osteoarthritis.
Conservative management including dietary and lifestyle modification was attempted over approximately 2 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with osteoarthritis.
Referring general physician requests authorization for knee brace.
